description: Triggers for managing multiple resume versions across different applications

queries.query: Help me set up a system to track which resume version I sent to each company
Manage my 4 different resume versions — I can't keep track of them
Create a version control system for my master resume and tailored versions
Design a naming convention and tracking method for my resume versions
I have multiple resumes for different roles — help me organize and track them
When I update my master resume, how do I sync changes to all my tailored versions?
Build a tracking log for my job applications that includes which resume was sent
Help me recall which resume version a company received after I applied
Create a resume update workflow for when my experience changes
Set up a master resume plus tailored version system for my job search
Tailor my resume specifically for this job description
Fix the formatting inconsistencies in my resume
Write stronger bullet points for my experience section
Add metrics to my resume achievements
Optimize my resume for ATS keyword matching
Create a professional summary section
Write an executive resume for leadership roles
Build a cover letter for this job
Create a reference list for my applications
Prepare me for job interviews at tech companies
